title: Canopy Growth Corp (CGC) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Navigating Growth and Challenges
text: Canopy Growth's Q3 2026 earnings call highlighted company navigating growth opportunities while managing operational challenges. Consolidated net revenue of $75 million with gross margin of 32%. Adjusted EBITDA loss narrowed to $3 million representing company's narrowest loss to date. Free cash flow outflow improved to $28 million with 17% year-over-year improvement. Cash position strengthened to $178 million as of December 31, 2024. Company target achieving positive adjusted EBITDA at some point during fiscal 2027. Canada Cannabis segment reported record medical cannabis revenue with 16% growth year-over-year. Adult-use segment down 10% year-over-year but improving quarter-over-quarter. Medical cannabis achievement marks key milestone in company's diversified revenue strategy. Company managing gross margin pressures from mix changes and international expansion while capturing market share gains.
